requirements_addressed: url field with default and NATS_URL binding
connect_timeout field with ge=0.0 and NATS_CONNECT_TIMEOUT binding
reconnect_time_wait field with ge=0.0 and NATS_RECONNECT_TIME_WAIT binding
max_reconnect_attempts field with ge=0 and NATS_MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS binding
name field with min_length=1 and NATS_NAME binding
URL scheme validator (nats:// or tls:// only)
Lint/format checks pass with zero errors

completion_promises.evidence: Added `url: str = Field(default="nats://localhost:4222", description=...)` to NATSConfig. Tested default value in test_default_configuration_connects_to_localhost and env override in test_environment_variable_overrides_default_url.

Added `connect_timeout: float = Field(default=5.0, ge=0.0, description=...)`. Tested default in test_default_configuration_connects_to_localhost, zero boundary in test_connect_timeout_at_zero_is_accepted, negative rejection in test_negative_connect_timeout_is_rejected, env override in test_connect_timeout_env_override.
Added `reconnect_time_wait: float = Field(default=2.0, ge=0.0, description=...)`. Tested default, zero boundary, negative rejection, and env override.
Added `max_reconnect_attempts: int = Field(default=60, ge=0, description=...)`. Tested default, zero boundary (no retries), negative rejection, and env override.
Added `name: str = Field(default="nats-core-client", min_length=1, description=...)`. Tested default, env override, and empty/blank rejection.

Implemented url_must_have_valid_scheme validator using urllib.parse.urlparse. Tested with http://, ws://, ftp:// schemes in test_invalid_url_scheme_is_rejected, test_websocket_url_scheme_is_rejected, test_ftp_url_scheme_is_rejected. Also tested tls:// acceptance in test_tls_scheme_is_accepted.
The url_must_have_valid_scheme validator explicitly checks `if not v` and raises ValueError. Tested in test_empty_url_is_rejected.

Implemented name_must_not_be_blank validator that checks `v.strip()`. Combined with min_length=1 on the Field. Tested empty string in test_empty_client_name_is_rejected and whitespace-only in test_blank_client_name_is_rejected.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All fields carry `Field(description=...)` per project model pattern
completion_promises.evidence: All 5 fields have Field(description=...) with non-empty descriptions. Verified programmatically in test_all_fields_have_descriptions which iterates model_fields and asserts description is not None and not empty.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `ruff check src/nats_core/config.py tests/test_config.py` — 'All checks passed!'. Ran `mypy src/nats_core/config.py --strict` — 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.
